issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit instructions for the agent to follow.
Error handling and edge case scenarios are not covered in the examples.

scenarios.name: Shopping cart with derived total and add-to-cart action
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses primitive atoms and likely a derived total but typically misses the atom(null, write) write-only action pattern and useSetAtom optimization; treatment matches all rubric checks.

scenarios.name: Async user profile with Suspense loading
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends toward useEffect+useState or React Query rather than Jotai async atoms with Suspense and useAtomValue; treatment cleanly implements the prescribed async atom pattern.
